message:
fix(ci): Increase benchmark timeout and fix file descriptor bug

- Increase CI benchmark job timeout from 30 to 45 minutes
  The build phase takes 11-14 minutes, leaving insufficient time for
  some benchmarks to complete within the 30-minute limit.

- Fix double-close bug in applyTracePatterns()
  The script file was being closed both explicitly and in defer block,
  causing EBADF panic. Now only closed explicitly before sed runs.

files.patch:
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ concurrency:
 jobs:
   benchmark:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 30
+    timeout-minutes: 45
     strategy:
       matrix:
         benchmark:
